experimental_design: the interaction between SIRT1 and the PP4 complex was specifically boosted by genotoxic stress conditions.
factor_value: the interplay between SIRT1 and PP4 may play an important role in human pathologies...
number_of_fractions: processed through a sequence of seven chromatography steps.
number_of_samples: 2 biological replicates (Sirt1−/− and Wt MEFs) and 7 fractions.
